evaluation_summary.actors: The provided JSON lists no actors. The documentation describes numerous actors including Users, Validators, BGT Holders, Liquidity Providers, Protocols/Developers, Guardians, Token Managers, and the Berachain Foundation. All are missing.
evaluation_summary.assets: The provided JSON lists no assets. The documentation details various assets such as $BERA, $BGT, $HONEY tokens, NFTs, Receipt Tokens, Governance Proposals, and Incentives. All are missing.
evaluation_summary.components: The provided JSON lists no components. The documentation describes a complex architecture with components like the Berachain L1, EVM, BeaconKit, PoL mechanism, various dApps (BeraHub, BEX, HoneySwap), smart contracts (Reward Vaults, Governance, HoneyFactory), bridges, and tools. All are missing.
evaluation_summary.data_flows: The provided JSON lists no data flows. The documentation implies numerous data flows related to PoL, governance, dApp interactions, bridging, and token management. All are missing.
evaluation_summary.trust_boundaries: The provided JSON lists no trust boundaries. The documentation suggests several trust boundaries, such as between users and dApps, dApps and smart contracts, and validators and the network. All are missing.
evaluation_summary.behaviors: The provided JSON lists no behaviors. The documentation describes a wide range of behaviors including transacting, staking, providing liquidity, governing, trading, bridging, and developing on Berachain. All are missing.

findings.description: Actor 'User' (interacting with wallets, dApps, airdrops, governance, PoL) is described in multiple documents (doc_2, doc_3, doc_5, doc_6, doc_7, etc.) but not extracted.
Actor 'Validator' (PoL participant, block producer) is described in doc_3, doc_7, doc_10, doc_20, doc_21, doc_24, etc. but not extracted.
Actor '$BGT Holder' (governance participant, delegator) is described in doc_3, doc_7, doc_10, doc_24, doc_27, doc_28 but not extracted.
Actor 'Liquidity Provider' (PoL participant) is described in doc_7, doc_11, doc_24, doc_27 but not extracted.
Actor 'Protocol/Ecosystem Project/dApp Developer' is described in doc_7, doc_9, doc_14, doc_21, doc_24, doc_25 but not extracted.
Actor 'Guardian' (governance oversight for malicious proposals) is described in doc_3, doc_14 but not extracted.
Actor 'Token Manager' (manages incentives for Reward Vaults) is described in doc_15, doc_21 but not extracted.
Actor 'Berachain Foundation' (ecosystem support, RFRV review) is described in doc_14, doc_29 but not extracted.
Asset '$BERA Token' (native gas and staking token) is described in doc_2, doc_6, doc_7, doc_10, doc_19, doc_26, doc_29 but not extracted.
Asset '$BGT Token' (Bera Governance Token, for staking and governance) is described in doc_3, doc_7, doc_10, doc_18, doc_19, doc_20, doc_27 but not extracted.
Asset '$HONEY Token' (native stablecoin) is described in doc_11, doc_12, doc_18, doc_19, doc_28 but not extracted.
Asset 'NFT Collections' (e.g., Bong Bears, Bit Bears) are described in doc_2, doc_4, doc_29 but not extracted.
Asset 'Receipt Tokens' (PoL eligible, e.g., LP tokens) are described in doc_7, doc_23, doc_24, doc_25, doc_27 but not extracted.
Asset 'Governance Proposals' are described in doc_3, doc_13, doc_14, doc_18, doc_24 but not extracted.
Asset 'Incentives' (protocol-provided tokens for PoL) are described in doc_7, doc_15, doc_16, doc_17, doc_21, doc_24 but not extracted.
Asset 'Private Keys / Wallet Phrase' is described in doc_5 but not extracted.
Component 'Berachain L1 Blockchain' is described in doc_9, doc_19 but not extracted.
Component 'Proof-of-Liquidity (PoL) Mechanism' is described in doc_7, doc_9, doc_10, doc_19, doc_21, doc_22, doc_23, doc_24 but not extracted.
Component 'BeaconKit' (Consensus Layer Framework) is described in doc_8, doc_9, doc_19 but not extracted.
Component 'Wallets' (e.g., MetaMask) are described in doc_2, doc_5 but not extracted.
Component 'BeraHub' (dApp for PoL management, BEX, Governance) is described in doc_3, doc_11, doc_13, doc_15, doc_16, doc_17, doc_20, doc_21, doc_25, doc_27 but not extracted.
Component 'Berachain BEX' (Native DEX) is described in doc_3, doc_7, doc_9, doc_11, doc_13, doc_18, doc_19, doc_25, doc_27, doc_28 but not extracted.
Component 'Honey Swap' (dApp for $HONEY) is described in doc_12, doc_18, doc_27, doc_28 but not extracted.
Component 'Reward Vaults' (PoL smart contracts) are described in doc_3, doc_7, doc_10, doc_11, doc_13, doc_14, doc_15, doc_18, doc_20, doc_21, doc_23, doc_24, doc_25, doc_27 but not extracted.
Component 'Governance System' (OpenZeppelin contracts, Timelock) is described in doc_3, doc_13, doc_14, doc_19, doc_21, doc_25, doc_27, doc_28 but not extracted.
Component 'Berachain Bridge' (powered by LayerZero) is described in doc_6 but not extracted.
Component 'Berachain NFT Bridge' is described in doc_4 but not extracted.
Component 'BeraScan Block Explorer' is described in doc_18, doc_26, doc_27, doc_28 but not extracted.
Component 'Airdrop Checker/Claim Tool' is described in doc_2 but not extracted.
Data flow 'User provides liquidity to a protocol, receives receipt tokens, stakes them in a Reward Vault, and earns $BGT' is described in doc_7, doc_25, doc_27 but not extracted.

Data flow 'User delegates $BGT to a Validator; Validator directs $BGT emissions to Reward Vaults and receives Incentives; User (delegator) receives a share of these Incentives' is described in doc_7, doc_10, doc_16, doc_21 but not extracted.
Data flow 'User creates or votes on a governance proposal using $BGT' is described in doc_3, doc_13, doc_27 but not extracted.
Data flow 'User mints $HONEY by depositing whitelisted collateral into HoneyFactory, or redeems $HONEY for collateral' is described in doc_12, doc_28 but not extracted.
Data flow 'User swaps tokens on Berachain BEX' is described in doc_11, doc_13 but not extracted.
Data flow 'Validator stakes $BERA, proposes blocks, and receives $BERA fees and $BGT rewards (base and boosted)' is described in doc_7, doc_20, doc_26 but not extracted.
Data flow 'Protocol submits a Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) to get its Reward Vault whitelisted via governance' is described in doc_14 but not extracted.
Data flow 'User claims $BERA airdrop' is described in doc_2 but not extracted.
Trust boundary 'User and Wallet Software' is implied in doc_5 but not extracted.
Trust boundary 'User and dApp (e.g., BeraHub, BEX)' is implied in doc_11, doc_12, doc_13 but not extracted.
Trust boundary 'dApp and Smart Contracts on Berachain' is implied throughout the documentation but not extracted.
Trust boundary 'Validator and Berachain Network Consensus' is implied in doc_7, doc_20 but not extracted.
Trust boundary 'Berachain Network and External Networks (e.g., Ethereum via Bridges)' is implied in doc_4, doc_6 but not extracted.
Behavior 'User transacting on Berachain (paying gas fees with $BERA)' is described in doc_6, doc_18, doc_26 but not extracted.
Behavior 'User participating in Proof-of-Liquidity (providing liquidity, staking receipt tokens, earning $BGT)' is described in doc_7, doc_11, doc_24, doc_25, doc_27 but not extracted.
Behavior 'User/BGT Holder delegating $BGT to Validators (boosting) and earning incentives' is described in doc_7, doc_10, doc_16, doc_21, doc_27 but not extracted.
Behavior 'User/BGT Holder participating in Governance (creating proposals, voting)' is described in doc_3, doc_13, doc_18, doc_27 but not extracted.
Behavior 'Validator participating in consensus, proposing blocks, and earning rewards' is described in doc_7, doc_20, doc_24 but not extracted.
Behavior 'User trading tokens on BEX' is described in doc_11, doc_13 but not extracted.
Behavior 'User minting or redeeming $HONEY stablecoin' is described in doc_12, doc_28 but not extracted.
Behavior 'User bridging assets (tokens, NFTs) to/from Berachain' is described in doc_4, doc_6 but not extracted.
Behavior 'Protocol offering incentives to attract $BGT emissions to its Reward Vault' is described in doc_15, doc_21, doc_24 but not extracted.
Behavior 'User claiming $BERA airdrop' is described in doc_2 but not extracted.
